summary.key_theme: Eaton 透過收購 Boyd Thermal 與投資 SPAN 強化資料中心與智慧家庭電氣化布局，獲市場分析師看好其長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Eaton completes acquisition of leading liquid-cooling solutions provider Boyd Thermal
bullish.reason: 完成對 Boyd Thermal 的收購，直接提升了 Eaton 在資料中心液冷技術的競爭力，打造完整的電網到晶片解決方案。

bullish.title: Eaton Corporation Invests $75M In SPAN To Expand Smart Home Energy Panels
bullish.reason: 投入 7500 萬美元與 SPAN 結盟，切入智慧家庭電氣化市場，有助於解決電網限制並滿足日益增長的家庭能源需求。

bullish.title: RBC Capital and Bernstein Lift Eaton Corporation plc (ETN) Price Targets
bullish.reason: 知名投行調升目標價，反映市場對其在電氣化與 AI 基礎設施領域的強勁成長預期。

bullish.title: Eaton Stock Hit A Record High, Paused, On The Move Again
bullish.reason: 相對強度評級 (Relative Strength Rating) 升級，顯示股價動能強勁，技術面處於上升趨勢。

bullish.title: Eaton: Solid Operating Results Meet Elevated Market Expectations
bullish.reason: 分析師給予買入評級，認為其營運表現穩健，足以支撐目前的高估值。

bearish.title: Has Eaton (ETN) Run Too Far After A 132.8% Three Year Share Price Surge
bearish.reason: 股價三年內飆漲超過 130%，市場開始質疑其估值是否過高，存在回調風險。

bearish.title: Eaton's Electrification Surge Is Real, But The Stock May Already Be Too Hot
bearish.reason: 儘管認可其電氣化轉型策略，但認為股價已反映過多利多，短期內上行空間有限。

neutral.title: How The Eaton (ETN) Investment Story Is Evolving As Analyst Views Rebalance
neutral.reason: 公允價值模型僅微幅調整，顯示分析師對其未來成長預期已趨於穩定。

neutral.title: Investors Heavily Search Eaton Corporation, PLC (ETN): Here is What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 僅反映市場關注度提升，並未提供新的基本面利多或利空訊息。
